title: Villager Trade Editor
description: A serverside mod which allows the editing of Villager trade data through a GUI
body:
![Villager Trade Editor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4a8a2e7f131f2061528a2eedbfff5b6174d6a58.png)

A serverside mod used to edit villager trade data through an extensive command system and serverside GUI.

Keep in mind you will need to select a villager with `/v select` before running any actions on the villager.

You can run `/v help` for a detailed list of all commands.

- This mod requires LuckPerms with permissions setup, which can be found at [https://luckperms.net/](https://luckperms.net/)
- When using the copy command, this saves nbt data inside the villager to the world. You can find this in your world file under `/world/villager`, which you can use an [NBT Editor](https://nbt.mcph.to/) if you wish to view and edit.


## Permissions
- vte.command.help
- vte.command.select
- vte.command.gui
- vte.command.copy
- vte.command.upload


## Please note
This mod was done as a commission. Should you be interested in getting any other mods, please check out https://sebastianb.dev/commissions
